{"CommandLine":"python -c "
import openpyxl

file_path = 'g:/My Drive/UCL/BSMA/me file/Archive/BSMA_Actual Coding Sheet_v2.xlsx'
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook(file_path)
ws = wb.active

# Columns (1-indexed): 
# AY (51): Data Structure Type
# AZ (52): Explicit Anchor Identity
# BA (53): Specific Rater Identity
# BB (54): Construct Role in Model
# BC (55): Pairwise Sample Size

# BSMA0001 (Rows 4, 5, 6)
bsma1_data = [
    ('Dyadic', 'Leader', 'Subordinate', 'Mediator', 383),    # Row 4 (Subordinate's self-efficacy)
    ('Dyadic', 'Leader', 'Subordinate', 'Moderator', 383),   # Row 5 (Abusive Supervision)
    ('Dyadic', 'Leader', 'Self', 'Outcome', 383)             # Row 6 (Subordinate's voice behavior)
]

for i, row_data in enumerate(bsma1_data):
    row = 4 + i
    for j, val in enumerate(row_data):
        ws.cell(row=row, column=51+j).value = val

# BSMA0002 (Rows 8, 9, 10, 11)
bsma2_data = [
    ('Single-source', 'Public Manager', 'Self', 'Mediator', 158), # Row 8 (Collaboration)
    ('Single-source', 'Public Manager', 'Self', 'Outcome', 158),  # Row 9 (Performance)
    ('Single-source', 'Public Manager', 'Self', 'Control', 158),  # Row 10 (Years of Exp)
    ('Single-source', 'Public Manager', 'Self', 'Control', 158)   # Row 11 (Scope)
]

for i, row_data in enumerate(bsma2_data):
    row = 8 + i
    for j, val in enumerate(row_data):
        ws.cell(row=row, column=51+j).value = val

wb.save(file_path)
print('Data populated successfully.')
"","Cwd":"C:\temp","WaitMsBeforeAsync":500,"toolAction":"Populating new columns","toolSummary":"Populate Excel"}
